description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:alpine Docker image with a single test stage and a global before_script that installs git, build-base, and bash via apk, creates the Go workspace under /go/src, copies the project into /go/src/gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH, creates a symlink in /go/src/_/builds, and runs make dep. Define a hidden .race_detector job in the test stage that runs make race. Add a lint_code job in the test stage that runs go get github.com/go-critic/go-critic/cmd/gocritic, go install github.com/go-critic/go-critic/cmd/gocritic, and then make lint. Add a code_coverage job in the test stage that runs make coverage. Add a unit_tests job in the test stage that runs make test. Configure a cache for the Go module directories /go/src/github.com, /go/src/gitlab.com, /go/src/golang.org, /go/src/google.golang.org, and /go/src/gopkg.in.
